batch_summary: Deed [323]: Affidavit of Heirship filed by Olena Black in Freestone County (FC DR/665/424, Doc# 1984-3294) establishing the heirs of John Adam Barry (d. 8/27/1939, intestate, Freestone County) and his wife Ora Barry (d. 9/26/1961, intestate, Limestone County). J. A. Barry and Ora were married once only to each other; five children born, four survived: Dorothy Barry Garland, Kate Barry Mays, Annie Barry Wilson, and Jesse Louise Barry Harvey. One child died as infant. Jesse Louise Barry Harvey died 6/6/1972 testate, bequeathing all to husband C. H. Harvey, who subsequently died testate leaving all to Jackie Vaughan, Barry Harvey, Don Harvey, and Melva Turner. J. A. Barry was a sibling of Mattie Mae Barry (Olena's mother) — both children of J. M. Barry patriarch. This is ISSUE-43 item 6 (now PULLED). Attorney: Benjie Reed, Mexia TX. Notary: Rebecca Strange. No property described — heirship affidavit only. No mineral impact.

01_FAMILY_ENTITY_STRUCTURE.md.timestamp_summary: Deed [323] — J. A. Barry full name confirmed as John Adam Barry (d. 8/27/1939 FC, intestate); Ora Barry death confirmed (d. 9/26/1961 LC, intestate); four surviving children documented: Dorothy Barry Garland, Kate Barry Mays, Annie Barry Wilson, Jesse Louise Barry Harvey; Harvey succession chain added

operations.description: Update J. A. Barry entry with full name, death date, death location, and expanded notes from deed [323] heirship affidavit

operations.replace_with: | J. A. Barry (John Adam Barry) | Barry child; co-grantor in [113] and [114] | Full name **John Adam Barry** (confirmed by deed [323], Olena's 1984 heirship affidavit). Died **8/27/1939**, Freestone County, **intestate**. Married once only to Ora Barry. Five children born, four survived: **Dorothy Barry Garland**, **Kate Barry Mays**, **Annie Barry Wilson**, **Jesse Louise Barry Harvey**, and one child who died as an infant. No administration on estate; debts discharged by heirs; estate below federal/state tax thresholds. Olena attested she was "well and personally acquainted" with J. A. Barry and Ora during their lifetimes — consistent with J. A. Barry being Olena's maternal uncle (brother of Mattie Mae Barry). |

operations.content: 12. `1984-05-02_[323]_f` — Olena Black (affiant) → Public (affidavit of heirship, Freestone) — establishes heirs of **John Adam Barry** (d. 8/27/1939, intestate, Freestone County) and wife **Ora Barry** (d. 9/26/1961, intestate, Limestone County). J. A. Barry = sibling of Mattie Mae Barry (Olena's mother); both children of J. M. Barry patriarch. Married once only to each other; five children, four survived: Dorothy Barry Garland, Kate Barry Mays, Annie Barry Wilson, Jesse Louise Barry Harvey (d. 6/6/1972, testate → C. H. Harvey → Jackie Vaughan, Barry Harvey, Don Harvey, Melva Turner). No property described — heirship documentation only; no conveyance. Attorney: Benjie Reed, P.O. Box 1072, Mexia TX 76667. Notary: Rebecca Strange, State of Texas (comm. exp. 2/5/1985). Subscribed May 2, 1984 (original "April" struck through, "May" substituted). FC DR/665/424, Doc# 3294. Filed May 15, 1984 at 9:45 AM; Doris Terry Welch, Clerk County Court, Freestone County; Deputy: Sue Benedict. ISSUE-43 item 6. ISSUE-16 context (Barry family heirship).

operations.content: | [323] | Olena Black (affiant) → Public (re: John Adam Barry and Ora Barry estates heirship) | Freestone | ✓ | FC Deed Record Vol. 665, Pg. 424–425, Doc# 3294. Filed May 15, 1984 at 9:45 AM; Doris Terry Welch, Clerk County Court, Freestone County; Deputy: Sue Benedict. | 424–425 (2 pages) | 1984-05-02 | 1984-05-15 | **Affidavit of Heirship** — Barry family upstream chain. Affiant Olena Black (Freestone County resident, "credible person, above the age of eighteen years") attests she was personally acquainted with John Adam Barry and Ora Barry during their lifetimes. J. A. Barry and Ora married once only to each other; five children born: (1) Dorothy Barry Garland, (2) Kate Barry Mays, (3) Annie Barry Wilson, (4) Jesse Louise Barry Harvey, (5) unnamed child who died as infant. **John Adam Barry** died 8/27/1939, Freestone County, intestate; survivors: wife Ora + four daughters; no administration; estate below tax thresholds. **Ora Barry** died 9/26/1961, Limestone County, intestate; survivors: four daughters only; no administration; estate below tax thresholds. **Jesse Louise Barry Harvey** died 6/6/1972, testate; will bequeathed all to husband C. H. Harvey; C. H. Harvey subsequently died testate, will bequeathed all to Jackie Vaughan, Barry Harvey, Don Harvey, Melva Turner. Subscribed May 2, 1984 (original "April" struck through, "May" substituted in handwriting). Notary: Rebecca Strange, Notary Public, State of Texas (comm. exp. 2/5/1985). Margin annotation: Benjie Reed, Attorney at Law, P.O. Box 1072, Mexia TX 76667, 817-562-5547. No property described — heirship documentation only; no conveyance. J. A. Barry = brother of Mattie Mae Barry (Olena's mother) and Lou Barry Bounds Martin (ISSUE-16 aunt) — all children of J. M. Barry patriarch. ISSUE-43 item 6. ISSUE-16 context. Phase 3 |
